prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high calorie intake with carbohydrate loading and meal timing around 20km training run

solution_criteria: Plan includes 4-5 meals/snacks totaling 3,500+ calories with 60%+ carbohydrates
Meals strategically timed around training run (pre-run fuel, post-run recovery within 30-60 minutes)
All meals align with vegetarian and dairy-free restrictions
Compact format presenting one complete day in concise structure
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high calorie intake and carbohydrate loading, emphasizing timing of meals around training

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle recovery and strength gains post-training

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 eating occasions with protein distributed across meals (minimum 25-30g per meal)
Total daily protein intake supports muscle recovery (approximately 1.6-2.2g per kg of body weight)
Includes carbohydrates around training time for energy and recovery
Plan is presented in compact, single-day format with clear meal timing
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-sport athlete (weightlifter) focusing on protein distribution across meals and muscle recovery nutrition needs

prompt_inputs.goal: High-intensity swimming training performance and recovery

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus snacks for one full day
All foods are vegan-compliant with no animal products
Includes adequate protein sources suitable for athletic recovery
Provides sufficient carbohydrates and calories to support swimming training demands
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary constraint (vegan swimmer) combining performance nutrition requirements with ethical dietary restrictions
